LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Tailjob.label: 魅魔尾巴尾交
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Vaginal.label: 魅魔尾巴插阴
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Vaginal.logRul: r_logentry->被 [RECIPIENT_nameDef] 强行用尾巴插了阴道.
r_logentry->用尾巴强行插了 [INITIATOR_nameDef]的阴道.
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Anal.label: 魅魔尾巴插肛
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Anal.logRulesI: r_logentry->被 [RECIPIENT_nameDef] 强行用尾巴插了肛门.
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Envelop.label: 魅魔尾巴包裹
LanguageData.Rape_SuccubusTail_Reverse_Envelop.logRul: r_logentry->用尾巴强行包裹住 [RECIPIENT_nameDef]的老二.
r_logentry->被 [INITIATOR_nameDef]用尾巴强行包裹住老二.
